state.next-action: Phase `19` is now in progress. `19-01` shipped the first-party inbound media ingestion contract: admin-only `inbound-media-ingestions` records in `src/collections/InboundMediaIngestions.ts`, shared validation and idempotency helpers in `src/lib/media/inboundMediaIngestion.ts`, a workspace service in `src/lib/media/inboundMediaIngestionWorkspace.ts`, and admin-only ops review or replay routes at `/api/internal/ops/inbound-media` and `/api/internal/ops/inbound-media/[id]`. The migration `20260410_023500_add_inbound_media_ingestions` is applied locally, and verification passes for focused vitest, eslint, `npm.cmd exec -- tsc --noEmit`, `npm.cmd run payload -- migrate`, and `npm.cmd run build` with only the usual non-blocking GLib warnings. Next action: start `19-02` and wire the remaining composer media-slot polish so replace, drag-drop, and slot-focused selection always reopen the correct page-local media surface immediately.
